note: Fondation Louis Vuitton, Paris. Hand-maintained capture fixture (French-language site). Refresh each season from fondationlouisvuitton.fr/en/exhibitions. Future-opening only.

items.title: Gustave Fayet, Collector – Designer: Icons of Modern Art
items.description: Fayet as collector and designer — 250+ works from his dispersed collection plus his own creations: Van Gogh, Gauguin, Redon, Degas, Cézanne, Toulouse-Lautrec, Renoir, Morisot, Signac, Bonnard, Vuillard, Matisse
